docs: Creates a new DALLA token contract with initial supply
constructors.label: new

docs: # DALLA Token - PSP22 Compliant
The official wrapped token for BelizeChain's native DALLA currency.
Implements the PSP22 standard (Polkadot's ERC20 equivalent).
## Features
- PSP22 standard compliance (transfer, approve, transferFrom)
- Role-based access control (admin, minter roles)
- Two-step ownership transfer
- Minting (controlled by minter role) and self-burning
- Total supply tracking with max supply cap
- Event emission for all state changes
- Allowance management with increase/decrease helpers
## Economics
- Symbol: DALLA
- Decimals: 12 (same as native DALLA)
- Max Supply: 100 million DALLA (100_000_000 * 10^12)
- Initial Supply: 21 million DALLA (like Bitcoin's 21M)
Event emitted when tokens are transferred
events.label: Transfer

docs: Event emitted when authorized DAO is updated
events.label: AuthorizedDaoUpdated

docs: Returns the token name
messages.label: token_name

messages.label: total_supply

docs: Returns the balance of an account
messages.label: balance_of

docs: Returns the allowance granted by owner to spender

docs: Transfers tokens from caller to recipient (PSP22)
messages.label: transfer

docs: Approves spender to spend tokens on behalf of caller
messages.label: approve

docs: Transfers tokens from one account to another using allowance (PSP22)
messages.label: transfer_from

docs: Increases the allowance granted to spender
messages.label: increase_allowance

docs: Decreases the allowance granted to spender
messages.label: decrease_allowance

docs: Mints new tokens (requires MINTER_ROLE)
messages.label: mint

docs: Burns tokens from caller's balance
messages.label: burn

messages.label: propose_ownership

docs: Accepts pending ownership (step 2 of two-step transfer)
messages.label: accept_ownership

docs: Returns the contract owner
messages.label: owner

docs: Returns the pending owner (if any)
messages.label: pending_owner

docs: Grants a role to an account (admin only)
messages.label: grant_role

docs: Revokes a role from an account (admin only)
messages.label: revoke_role

docs: Checks if an account has a specific role
messages.label: has_role

docs: Proposes a new code hash for upgrade (admin only, step 1)
messages.label: propose_code_hash_upgrade

docs: Executes a previously proposed upgrade after timelock (admin only, step 2)
messages.label: execute_code_hash_upgrade

docs: Cancel a pending code hash upgrade proposal (admin only)
messages.label: cancel_code_hash_upgrade

docs: Returns the pending code hash upgrade (if any)
messages.label: pending_code_hash_upgrade

docs: Sets the authorized DAO contract that can lock tokens for voting (admin only)
messages.label: set_authorized_dao

docs: Returns the authorized DAO contract address
messages.label: authorized_dao

docs: Locks an account's tokens until a given block (callable only by authorized DAO)
The lock is only extended, never reduced — if the account already has
a longer lock, the existing lock is preserved. Returns `true` on success,
`false` if the caller is not the authorized DAO.
messages.label: lock_for_voting

docs: Returns the block number until which an account's tokens are locked
messages.label: get_voting_lock

docs: Pauses the contract (admin only)
messages.label: pause

docs: Unpauses the contract (admin only)
messages.label: unpause

docs: Returns whether the contract is paused
messages.label: is_paused
